privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthetically generate a new SEB Server institution with the name 'Pacific Northwest Health Sciences Testing Center' and URL suffix 'pnhstc'. The agent is also required to explicitly activate the institution. These target values are synthetically constructed via the task instructions and enforced by the test scripts.
